rationale: The training recipe is already flat and the only consistent wins came from exact pre-quantization balancing. This run compounds on the current best by refining that path instead of changing training dynamics: it applies multiple exact balancing passes before int8 export, and it switches grouped V/proj aggregation from an arithmetic mean to an RMS-style power mean so shared KV channels are matched to the stronger downstream consumer heads. The transform remains function-preserving before quantization, so it directly targets the final `final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb` metric without risking the stable Mac-mini training path.
title: Iterative exact balancing with RMS-grouped V/proj stats
